entities.description: National law designed to enable farmers' access to improved seeds

entities.name: NEW SEED SYSTEM
entities.description: The system resulting from the Seed Law, described as onerous and unaffordable

entities.description: Local arrangement for managing natural resources established under decentralised governance

entities.name: DECENTRALISED GOVERNANCE POLICY

entities.name: BRICOLAGE
entities.description: Analytical framework used for performing an institutional diagnostic

entities.description: The process of analyzing institutional variety and underlying logics
